description: General Hale receives a report regarding Deke's background; her subordinate reveals suspicious genetic findings, increasing the intrigue around his origins. This brief scene foreshadows future complications and mystery related to Deke’s true identity.

transcript.line: I don't know. Thinking Deke Shaw could possibly be an LMD, I ran a genetic profile to see if he was biologically linked to anyone.
And it came up with a match?
No. It came up with two.
Now, by the powers vested in me by, well, by the two of you, I am so happy to pronounce you husband and wife. You may kiss the bride.
So, what about you, bride or groom?
Uh, I mean, to be honest, I don't really know either one of them.
